text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I lost yet again...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I got special permission to come and race in
Japan, and this is all I have to show for it. It's
rather pathetic...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was naive. No matter how much fun I have
running, that's not enough to get results...
choice_data_list:
The joy you get from running is your strong
point.

The joy you get from running is your strong
point.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I was naive. No matter how much fun I have
running, that's not enough to get results...
choice_data_list:
The joy you get from running is your strong
point.

The joy you get from running is your strong
point.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
choice_data_list: You also showed both effort and determination.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Really? So I've got to remember that I did do
well in some areas.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We have to reflect on both what went right and
what caused the loss in order to move forward,
right?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's win the ne—no, I will win the next one!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So I can show everybody my best smile. And so I
can enjoy the races even more! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...Ngh. I guess harsh feedback is just what I need
right now...
choice_data_list:
But it's not something you need to deal with
alone.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As her trainer, I'm just as responsible for this loss.
I tell her that I've failed to draw out her true
strength.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now, let's not stand about moping! I want to live
up to your expectations too!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Right, I won't lose anymore! Let's shoot for the
stars!
